description: Export Indicator - Real-time tackle clip export progress box in Column 1 showing status, clip count, and progress bar derived from the database

userStories.title: Add ExportProgress DB struct and query function
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a database struct and query function that computes tackle clip export progress for the active video so the TUI has accurate counts to display.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ExportProgress struct to db/models.go with fields: TotalTackles int, CompletedClips int, PendingClips int, ErrorClips int

Create db/sql/select_export_progress.sql with SQL: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT n.id) AS total_tackles, COUNT(CASE WHEN nc.status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) AS completed_clips, COUNT(CASE WHEN nc.status = 'pending' THEN 1 END) AS pending_clips, COUNT(CASE WHEN nc.status = 'error' THEN 1 END) AS error_clips FROM notes n INNER JOIN videos v ON v.id = n.video_id LEFT JOIN note_clips nc ON nc.note_id = n.id WHERE v.path = ? AND n.category = 'tackle'
Embed the new SQL file in db/queries.go following the existing //go:embed pattern, exposing it as SelectExportProgressSQL string constant

Add QueryExportProgress(database *sql.DB, videoPath string) (ExportProgress, error) function to db/functions.go that executes SelectExportProgressSQL, scans the single result row into ExportProgress, and returns it
CGO_ENABLED=0 go vet ./... passes

userStories.title: Add ExportIndicator render component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a pure render function that converts ExportIndicatorState into a 5-line InfoBox so Column 1 can display export progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tui/components/exportindicator.go with ExportIndicatorState struct: TotalTackles int, CompletedClips int, PendingClips int, ErrorClips int

Add ExportStatus() string method on ExportIndicatorState with priority logic: returns 'Completed' when TotalTackles > 0 && CompletedClips == TotalTackles && PendingClips == 0 && ErrorClips == 0; returns 'Processing' when PendingClips > 0; returns 'Error' when ErrorClips > 0 && PendingClips == 0; returns 'Ready' for all other cases
Add ExportIndicator(state ExportIndicatorState, width int) string function that builds 3 content lines and calls RenderInfoBox("Export", contentLines, width, false)
Row 1: label 'Status:' left-aligned, value right-aligned in innerWidth, value coloured using lipgloss: Ready=styles.Lavender, Processing=styles.Amber, Error=styles.Red, Completed=styles.Green
Row 2: label 'Clips:' left-aligned, value '<completed>/<total>' right-aligned in innerWidth, both numbers in styles.LightLavender

Row 3: ASCII progress bar spanning innerWidth chars using '█' for filled and '░' for empty, coloured styles.Cyan; fraction = CompletedClips/TotalTackles clamped to [0.0, 1.0]; empty bar (all '░') when TotalTackles == 0; filled = int(fraction * float64(innerWidth))
innerWidth = width - 4 (2 border chars + 2 padding spaces)
CGO_ENABLED=0 go vet ./... passes

userStories.title: Wire ExportIndicatorState into the TUI Model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the TUI Model to hold and refresh ExportIndicatorState on the existing ~250ms tick so the render component always has live data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add exportIndicator components.ExportIndicatorState field to tui.Model struct in tui/tui.go

Add (m *Model) refreshExportProgress() method to tui/tui.go that: calls db.QueryExportProgress(m.db, m.videoPath); on success maps result fields into m.exportIndicator (TotalTackles, CompletedClips, PendingClips, ErrorClips); on error silently returns without changing m.exportIndicator
In the existing tea.Tick handler in Update() that refreshes m.statusBar.TimePos (the ~250ms video position poll), add a call to m.refreshExportProgress()
CGO_ENABLED=0 go vet ./... passes

userStories.title: Render ExportIndicator at the bottom of Column 1
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the Export Indicator box at the bottom of Column 1 so I can monitor tackle clip export progress without leaving the tagging view.
acceptanceCriteria: In renderColumn1 in tui/columns.go, after appending the Selected Tag detail card lines (or after the summary box when no item is selected), append the output of components.ExportIndicator(m.exportIndicator, width) split on newlines
The ExportIndicator box is always appended (even when TotalTackles == 0 — shows Status: Ready, Clips: 0/0, empty bar)
The overall Column 1 output remains wrapped in layout.Container{Width: width, Height: height}.Render(...) guaranteeing exact dimensions
CGO_ENABLED=0 go vet ./... passes
